ddls:
CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company associated with the invoice */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the invoice payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the invoice (e.g., Paid, Unpaid, Failed) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount for the invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was issued */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Unique invoice number for reference */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Terms of payment (e.g., net 30, net 60) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the invoice */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the invoice */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the invoice */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of company (e.g., Vendor, Property Management) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the company */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the company */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the company record */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the company record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the company record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice for which payment was made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was processed */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid against the invoice */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, check) */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the payment record */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the payment record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Paid, Unpaid, Pending, Failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the status record */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the status record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_status_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_status_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment associated with the log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry (e.g., Payment processed, Payment failed) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the log entry */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the log record */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the log record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_logs_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., finance staff, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user record */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disputes" (
  "dispute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dispute */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice being disputed */,
  "dispute_date" TEXT /* Date when the dispute was raised */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dispute */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the dispute was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the dispute record */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the dispute record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the dispute record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dispute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disputes_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disputes_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disputes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., Status Update) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* Value after the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the change */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the history record */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the history record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_history_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_history_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_history_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
